attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ELFND.CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
ELFND.CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER,
ELFND.ENABLED_FLAG,
ELFND.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
ELFND.FLEX_VALUE,
ELFND.FLEX_VALUE_ID,
ELFND.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
ELFND.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
ELFND.GLOBAL_NAME,
ELFND.HIERARCHY_LEVEL,
ELFND.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_HIGH,
ELFND.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_LOW,
ELFND.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
ELFND.STRUCTURED_HIERARCHY_LEVEL,
ELFND.SUMMARY_FLAG,
ELFND.VALUE_CATEGORY 
FROM 
(
SELECT
OMFND.CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
OMFND.CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER,
OMFND.ENABLED_FLAG,
OMFND.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
OMFND.FLEX_VALUE,
OMFND.FLEX_VALUE_ID,
OMFND.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
OMFND.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
OMFND.GLOBAL_NAME,
OMFND.HIERARCHY_LEVEL,
OMFND.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_HIGH,
OMFND.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_LOW,
OMFND.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
OMFND.STRUCTURED_HIERARCHY_LEVEL,
OMFND.SUMMARY_FLAG,
OMFND.VALUE_CATEGORY 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OM_FND_FLEX_VALUES  OMFND
UNION ALL 
SELECT
MFFND.CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
MFFND.CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER,
MFFND.ENABLED_FLAG,
MFFND.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
MFFND.FLEX_VALUE,
MFFND.FLEX_VALUE_ID,
MFFND.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
MFFND.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
MFFND.GLOBAL_NAME,
MFFND.HIERARCHY_LEVEL,
MFFND.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_HIGH,
MFFND.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_LOW,
MFFND.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
MFFND.STRUCTURED_HIERARCHY_LEVEL,
MFFND.SUMMARY_FLAG,
MFFND.VALUE_CATEGORY 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_FLEX_VALUES_GL  MFFND
UNION ALL
SELECT 
cast(NULL as timestamp(0)),
cast(NULL as integer),
CGFND.ENABLED_FLAG,
CGFND.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
CGFND.FLEX_VALUE,
CGFND.FLEX_VALUE_ID,
CGFND.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
CGFND.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
CGFND.GLOBAL_NAME,
CGFND.HIERARCHY_LEVEL,
CGFND.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_HIGH,
CGFND.PARENT_FLEX_VALUE_LOW,
CGFND.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
CGFND.STRUCTURED_HIERARCHY_LEVEL,
CGFND.SUMMARY_FLAG,
CGFND.VALUE_CATEGORY
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES CGFND
)  ELFND
WHERE 
(ELFND.FLEX_VALUE_ID ,ELFND.GLOBAL_NAME)
NOT IN 
(SELECT   ELFND.FLEX_VALUE_ID ,ELFND.GLOBAL_NAME FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_FLEX_VALUES   ELFND)
